# 13a Terminology — Long-Tail Codelists — core subdir (Stage v2.6 rebalance)

Long-tail CDISC controlled terminology codelists sourced from ``knowledge_base/terminology/core/`` (Stage v2.6 rebalance batch). Selected for user-priority coverage of core and supplementary subdirs beyond the rank-500 cutoff; questionnaires subdir is intentionally excluded here. Compact 3-column Term table (Code / Submission Value / Definition) with Definitions truncated to 100 characters at word boundaries, matching the mid-tier compression rule. Synonyms and NCI Concept Description links are omitted. "Related Domains" is a codelist-level metadata line.
